messages.text: The unfallen beat lets its held stroke drop toward you at last, all the tension of an eternity's delay released in a single downbeat of cold, and it lands on your pulse like a hammer that has been drawn back since the world began. The blow {verb} you!

The unfallen beat drives its long-delayed stroke down at the beat of you and the cold of the resolving count rushes in, and you throw yourself off the downbeat so the stroke lands on the stone where your heart had been.

The unfallen beat lands its whole withheld eternity in one stroke, the entire arrested measure falling on you at once, and the cold of it drives so deep that your own heart stutters as if trying to match a beat too vast to keep! The blow {verb} you!
